body.title: CLOSED: Add console logging for Igor startup and operations
body.result: paths().logs fixed → ADC canonical location; DailyConsoleFileHandler now writes to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/; dd444d14
body.description:
Igor is not logging to /home/akien/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/ today. Add console output so we can see what he's doing during startup and operation — helps with debugging silent failures or stuck processes.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/main.py, wild_igor/igor/paths.py, logging setup
**Design rules:** docs-in-code
**Scope boundary:** IN — add basic console.log / print statements at key startup points and during main loop iterations. OUT — implementing structured logging infrastructure.
**Test plan:** Manual: start Igor, verify console output appears in the expected log file.
